article.description: — Josh Giddey scored a career-high 32 points with 10 rebounds and nine assists, Nikola Vucevic added 26 points, and the Chicago Bulls beat the New York Knicks 135-125 on Friday night to stay undefeated and get out to their best start in nearly three...
article.headline: Giddey, Vucevic lead Bulls past Knicks 135-125 and a 5-0 start, their best in 29 years.

images.caption: New York Knicks vs. Chicago Bulls: Game Highlights
images.name: New York Knicks vs. Chicago Bulls: Game Highlights

article.linkText: Giddey, Vucevic lead Bulls past Knicks 135-125 and a 5-0 start, their best in 29 years.
article.story: CHICAGO -- — Josh Giddey scored a career-high 32 points with 10 rebounds and nine assists, Nikola Vucevic added 26 points, and the Chicago Bulls beat the New York Knicks 135-125 on Friday night to stay undefeated and get out to their best start in nearly three decades. Ayo Dosunmu came of the bench to score 22 points with nine assists for the Bulls, who improved to 5-0 and are off to their best start since the 1996-97 season when they opened 12-0 and went on to win the NBA Championship. Billy Donovan earned his 200th coaching win with Chicago. Jalen Brunson scored 29 points and OG Anunoby had 26 to help power New York’s second-half comeback attempt. The Knicks cut Chicago's lead to two points midway through the fourth quarter after trailing by 22 late in the second quarter. Karl-Anthony Towns added 22 points and 10 rebounds despite playing with a right quad strain and landing hard on his hip in the third quarter. Mikal Bridges scored 23 points in the NBA Cup group play opener for both teams. Both teams relied heavily on 3-pointers, with Chicago hitting 17 of 37 and New York converting 18 of 45. The Bulls outshot the Knicks overall from the floor, 53.6% to 49.5% . The Bulls opened a 72-53 lead at the half, penetrating with crisp passing plays. The Knicks went on a 23-9 run to start the third quarter and closed to 115-113 on Anunoby's 3 with 5:43 left in the fourth quarter before Vucevic and Giddey connected on key possessions to ice it. Mitchell Robinson returned to the Knicks starting lineup after missing New York's first four games with a left ankle injury and had 11 rebounds. Guerschon Yabusele returned after sitting out one game with a sprained left knee. Up next Knicks and Bulls: The teams meet again, on Sunday in New York. ------ AP NBA: https://apnews.com/hub/NBA

images.credit: Nathaniel S. Butler/NBAE via Getty Images

images.alt: Luka Doncic #77 of the Los Angeles Lakers handles the ball during the game against the Miami Heat on March 19, 2026 at Kaseya Center in Miami, Florida.
images.caption: The Lakers' championship odds are on the move again after Luka Doncic's injury.
images.name: Luka Doncic [1296x729]

images.alt: Los Angeles Lakers forward LeBron James (23) scores on a breakaway dunk during the first half of an NBA basketball game against the Orlando Magic, Saturday, March 21, 2026, in Orlando, Fla.
images.caption: LeBron James and the Lakers are on a roll as March winds down.
images.name: LeBron James  [1296x729]

images.alt: Victor Wembanyama #1 of the San Antonio Spurs handles the ball during the game against the Detroit Pistons on March 5, 2026 at the Frost Bank Center in San Antonio, Texas.
images.caption: Victor Wembanyama and the Spurs continue to see their championship odds shift.
images.name: Victor Wembanyama [1296x729]

images.alt: Jayson Tatum #0 of the Boston Celtics celebrates after scoring against the Dallas Mavericks during the second quarter at TD Garden on March 06, 2026 in Boston, Massachusetts.
images.caption: The Celtics' title odds have shortened since Jayson Tatum's return last week.
images.name: Jayson Tatum [1296x729]

images.alt: Victor Wembanyama #1 and Devin Vassell #24 of the San Antonio Spurs looks on during the game against the New Orleans Pelicans on January 25, 2026 at the Frost Bank Center in San Antonio, Texas.
images.caption: Led by Victor Wembanyama, the Spurs continue to see their NBA championship odds shorten.
images.name: Victor Wembanyama [1296x729]

images.alt: Cade Cunningham #2 of the Detroit Pistons handles the ball during the game against the Denver Nuggets on February 3, 2026 at Little Caesars Arena in Detroit, Michigan.
images.name: Cade Cunningham [1296x729]

images.alt: Oklahoma City Thunder guard Shai Gilgeous-Alexander (2) against the Phoenix Suns in the first half at Mortgage Matchup Center.
images.caption: Even after a rough stretch of games, the Thunder remain the heavy favorites to win the NBA championship.
images.name: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander [1296x729]

images.alt: Cleveland Cavaliers guard Donovan Mitchell (45) against the Phoenix Suns in the first half at Mortgage Matchup Center.
images.caption: Adding James Harden to a talented roster with the likes of Donovan Mitchell gives the Cavs a higher upside this season.
images.name: Donovan Mitchell [1296x729]

images.alt: Jaylen Brown #7 of the Boston Celtics shoots against the Portland Trail Blazers at TD Garden on January 26, 2026 in Boston, Massachusetts.
images.caption: The Celtics now have shorter odds to win the NBA title than the Spurs, Rockets, Knicks and Pistons.
images.name: Jaylen Brown [1296x729]

images.alt: Jamal Murray #27 of the Denver Nuggets dribbles the ball during the game against the Dallas Mavericks on January 14, 2026 at American Airlines Center in Dallas, Texas.
images.caption: Jamal Murray has led the Nuggets while Nikola Jokic recovers from injury.
images.name: Jamal Murray  [1296x729]

images.alt: Victor Wembanyama #1 of the San Antonio Spurs looks on during the game against the Cleveland Cavaliers on December 29, 2025 at the Frost Bank Center in San Antonio, Texas.
images.caption: Victor Wembanyama and the Spurs have seen their odds to win the NBA championship shorten in the past week.
images.name: Victor Wembanyama [1296x729]

videos.description: Josh Giddey throws it in the air for Matas Buzelis who rises and dunks over Landry Shamet.
videos.headline: Giddey lobs it to Buzelis for a thunderous Bulls slam

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Giddey lobs it to Buzelis for a thunderous Bulls slam) 2025/11/01 ESHEET

videos.description: Patrick Williams beats Mikal Bridges to the basket plus the foul to the approval of the Bulls' bench.
videos.headline: Patrick Williams makes a swift move to the hoop for and-1

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Patrick Williams makes a swift move to the hoop for and-1) 2025/11/01 ESHEET

videos.description: Josh Giddey caps off his 21-point first half with a 3-pointer only for Mikal Bridges to reply with a buzzer-beating trey.
videos.headline: Knicks answer Giddey's 3 with a Bridges' 3 to beat the buzzer

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Knicks answer Giddey's 3 with a Bridges' 3 to beat the buzzer ) 2025/11/01 ESHEET

videos.description: Karl-Anthony Towns somehow gets the and-1 to fall
videos.headline: Karl-Anthony Towns gets the and-1 to fall

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Karl-Anthony Towns gets the and-1 to fall) 2025/11/01 ESHEET

videos.description: Jalen Brunson eurosteps past Nikola Vucevic for the tough lay.
videos.headline: Jalen Brunson races downcourt for the lay-in

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jalen Brunson races downcourt for the lay-in) 2025/11/01 ESHEET

videos.description: Jalen Smith with the massive stuff at the rim
videos.headline: Jalen Smith elevates for the big-time block

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jalen Smith elevates for the big-time block) 2025/11/01 ESHEET

videos.description: Ayo Dosunmu crosses Mikal Bridges on his way to drop it in the basket for two.
videos.headline: Bulls end the third with a buzzer-beating layup from Dosunmu

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Bulls end the third with a buzzer-beating layup from Dosunmu) 2025/11/01 ESHEET

videos.description: Bulls get a huge momentum basket from Nikola Vucevic who puts it in plus the foul.
videos.headline: Nikola Vucevic hits the spin cycle for and-1

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Nikola Vucevic hits the spin cycle for and-1) 2025/11/01 ESHEET

videos.description: Kevin Huerter with the and-1 bucket
videos.headline: Kevin Huerter gets the basket plus the foul
